question: Will the 2026 NBA Finals go to a Game 7?
reason: Historically, about 20-25% of NBA Finals series reach Game 7.
evidence: Historically, about 20-25% of NBA Finals series reach Game 7. ([nbcsportsboston.com](https://www.nbcsportsboston.com/nba/nba-playoffs-game-7-history-statistics/609963/?utm_source=openai))
The 2026 NBA Finals are scheduled to begin on June 3, 2026, with a potential Game 7 on June 19, 2026. ([nba.com](https://www.nba.com/news/2026-nba-finals-schedule?utm_source=openai))
